nasb.text: Behold their two sons are with them there, Ahimaaz, Zadok’s son and Jonathan, Abiathar’s son; and by them you shall send me everything that you hear.”

esv.text: Behold, their two sons are with them there, Ahimaaz, Zadok’s son, and Jonathan, Abiathar’s son, and by them you shall send to me everything you hear.”

cnv.text: 看哪！還有他們的兩個兒子和他們在那裡，就是撒督的兒子亞希瑪斯和亞比亞他的兒子約拿單。你們聽見的一切，可以託他們來告訴我。”

ccb.text: 撒督的儿子亚希玛斯和亚比亚他的儿子约拿单也在那里，你听到什么消息，可以派他们传信给我。”
